title: Nutzungsbedingungen
description: By playing this game, you agree to the following terms and conditions. Please read them carefully.
multipleAccounts: Only a single account per user is allowed. Creating multiple accounts will result in all accounts being permanently banned.
bots: Using bots or any automated means to play the game is strictly prohibited. Any player found to be using bots will have all related accounts permanently banned.
bugAbuse: Exploiting bugs or glitches in the game for personal gain is not allowed. If you discover a bug, please report it to the developers. Abusing bugs will result in account suspension or banning.
termsAccepted: You have accepted the terms of service. Thank you for playing responsibly.
